title: hieracium dovrense subsp. praeustum
intro: Hieracium dovrense subsp. praeustum, also known as a lesser hawkweed or praeustum hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium dovrense subsp. praeustum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
